title: All In One adds opponent primary base stats while equipped

card.rawText: Add your opponent's primary creature's base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier to the equipped creature. This effect cannot stack.

effect.value: Add opponent primary base Atk Dice Rolls and base Modifier

plan.title: All In One adds opponent primary base stats while equipped
plan.summary: Attach All In One and verify the dynamic opponent-primary stat modifier route is available for the equipped creature.

notes: Pre-place this equip Magic on field magic slot attached to player_1 primary creature.
Use the card rules text for expected stat changes.

steps: Put All In One in player_1 magic slot.
Attach it to player_1 primary creature.
Verify the while-equipped effect is represented by runtime state/events.

expectedAssertions.label: All In One stays in player_1 magic slots

manualVerification: Opponent primary base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier should be added to the equipped creature and should not stack.
riskNotes: Dynamic opponent-stat calculation is the behavior under test; this may expose missing runtime implementation beyond static-route detection.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_001_all_in_one-001-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
